seo_title: Taurus May 2026 Horoscope: Key Dates, Love, Career & Crystal of the Month
h1: Taurus May 2026 Horoscope and Crystal of the Month
energy_theme: Birthday season asks for brave value resets
affirmation: I am the source of my own abundance

at_a_glance.Energy Theme: Birthday season with a super new moon in your sign
at_a_glance.Key Dates: Full Moon May 3 (Scorpio, 7th house) / New Moon May 16 (Taurus, 1st house, Super) / Blue Moon May 31 (Sagittarius, 8th house)
at_a_glance.Love: A partnership reaches clarity, then renewal
at_a_glance.Career: Your annual reset — name your value out loud
at_a_glance.Affirmation: I am the source of my own abundance

content:
This Month's Energy

Taurus, May 2026 is your month. The Scorpio Full Moon on May 3 lights your seventh house of partnership — a relationship, contract, or collaboration reaches clarity. The Taurus New Moon on May 16 is a super moon in your first house of identity — the single most important personal reset of your year, amplified. The Blue Moon on May 31 falls in your eighth house of shared resources, intimacy, and psychological depth. Abundance and expansion is the theme, and because the new moon is in your own sign, this year the abundance begins with you — not the partner, not the boss, not the client. You.

Key Dates for Taurus in May 2026

| Date | Transit | Meaning for Taurus | Do / Avoid | |------|---------|-------------------|------------| | May 3 | Full Moon in Scorpio (Flower Moon) | Partnership climax — Do: name what is working and what is finished / Avoid: clinging past the natural ending | | May 9 | Venus square Pluto | Power in love — Do: tell the truth about a hidden dynamic / Avoid: weaponizing money or attention | | May 16 | New Moon in Taurus (Super) | Annual identity and value reset — Do: set a 12-month intention for who you are becoming / Avoid: setting it based on someone else's need | | May 20 | Sun enters Gemini | Income conversations sharpen — Do: revisit pricing and budgets / Avoid: panic about security | | May 25 | Mars enters Virgo | Creative and romantic energy heats up — Do: make the art, ask the person, take the risk / Avoid: perfectionism that delays launch | | May 31 | Blue Moon in Sagittarius (Micro) | Shared money, intimacy, depth — Do: have the financial intimacy conversation / Avoid: avoiding what feels heavy |

Career & Money

Taurus, May 16 is the most important day of your work year. The super new moon in your first house is your annual permission slip to reprice yourself — raise your rates, ask for the title, send the proposal that feels too big. Venus, your ruling planet, square Pluto on May 9 may surface a money-power dynamic in a relationship or work partnership in the days before the new moon; treat it as data, not drama. The Blue Moon on May 31 in your eighth house of shared resources brings a tax, debt, investment, or jointly-held-money conversation to a clear conclusion. When Mars enters Virgo on May 25 your creative energy surges — the final week of May is one of your best windows of the year to launch a project, product, or piece of work that requires both craft and courage. If you opened an unconventional Uranus-in-Gemini income thread in April, May is the month it starts paying — the first paid student, the first download sale, the first consulting client outside your usual channel. Reinvest 30% of the new income back into the channel rather than spending it; Uranus cycles reward the Taurus who compounds the experiment for seven years rather than cashing out in seven weeks. Pair this month's reset with our crystals for wealth framework.

Love & Relationships

The Scorpio Full Moon on May 3 falls in your seventh house of partnership — your relationship house, the mirror. Single Taurus may meet someone with real weight, often through a professional setting or a friend introduction rather than a dating app; partnered Taurus will reach a clear yes-or-no moment about commitment, location, or future direction. Venus square Pluto on May 9 can expose a power undercurrent — money, attention, jealousy, control — that has been quietly shaping the relationship; notice whether the dynamic mirrors one you saw in your family of origin. The new moon in your own sign on May 16 says: do not set the next year of your life based on someone else's needs — get clear on who you are first, and let the partnership that matches that clarity find you. From May 25 Mars in Virgo lights your fifth house of romance — playful, creative, generous love returns, and the final week of May is one of your strongest windows of the season for first dates, rekindling, or making real weekly time for play. For support in opening the heart and softening defenses, see our crystals for love collection.

Health & Wellness

Birthday season is also body season, Taurus. The super new moon on May 16 wants you to begin a new health rhythm — not a punishment program, but a sustainable one. Green Aventurine is traditionally associated with calm, optimism, and heart-centered wellbeing — often used as a soothing companion during transitions or when the nervous system is overstimulated. Walk in nature, garden, cook real food, sleep well. The Blue Moon on May 31 in your eighth house can surface emotional weight you have been carrying; let something actually be released before the month closes. Birthday season is body season for Taurus; the super new moon on May 16 wants you to begin a sustainable health rhythm, not a punishment program. Walk in nature, garden, cook real food, sleep well, and protect the morning quiet — your nervous system regulates through the senses, so soft lighting and slow mornings are medicine, not luxuries. The Blue Moon on May 31 can surface emotional weight you have been carrying; let one thing actually be released before the month closes.

Crystal of the Month: Green Aventurine

Why this crystal fits Taurus this month. Taurus, your year ahead is shaped by Uranus moving through your income house — change, opportunity, expansion. Green Aventurine, traditionally associated with opportunity, growth, and calm confidence, lines up with both the new moon in your own sign and the longer Uranus cycle in your income house. It is the stone of the year-ahead version of you. How to use it during May. Hold Green Aventurine during the May 16 new moon intention. Keep it in your pocket on the day you raise your rates. Place it on your desk during the financial conversation the Blue Moon on May 31 brings. Best date to use it. May 16, the super Taurus New Moon in your first house — set the intention: I am the source of my own abundance this year. Read more. Deep dive in our full Green Aventurine meaning guide and explore the complete Taurus crystals collection.

Monthly Crystal Ritual

Date: May 16, Taurus New Moon (first house of self). 1. Cleanse your Green Aventurine under running water or with sound. 2. Write the answer to one question: If I trusted my own value completely, what would I ask for by my next birthday? Write the real answer. 3. Because Uranus is reshaping your income for the next seven years, write a second line: One new source of abundance I am open to this year is ___. 4. Place the Green Aventurine on the paper overnight in a spot you see every morning. Each day for a week, hold the stone for two minutes and reread your answers before opening your phone.

Shop

Want to build your monthly crystal toolkit? Explore the full Taurus crystal guide for stones traditionally connected with abundance, calm, and self-worth — Green Aventurine pairs beautifully with Rose Quartz for a Taurus birthday-season heart-and-worth kit.

FAQ

Is May 2026 a good month for Taurus? Yes — it is one of your best. The super new moon in your sign on May 16 is your annual reset, amplified. What does the Taurus super new moon on May 16 mean? It falls in your first house of identity and self-worth. The intention you set this day shapes your entire next year — and the super-moon amplification makes it more potent than a regular Taurus new moon. How will the May 3 Scorpio Full Moon affect Taurus? It lights your seventh house of partnership. A relationship, contract, or collaboration reaches clarity — whether to deepen, restructure, or release. What is the best crystal for Taurus in May 2026? Green Aventurine. With a new moon in your own sign and Uranus beginning a long income cycle, calm opportunity and self-worth are the work — and Green Aventurine is the traditional ally for both. Taurus-only question: Is May 2026 the right time to raise my rates? Yes. The super new moon in your first house on May 16, plus the Blue Moon in your shared-resources house on May 31, makes the second half of May one of the strongest repricing windows of your year.
